# R2 SQL

Cloudflare's serverless, distributed query engine for data stored in R2 Data Catalog

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [R2 SQL](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/index.md): A distributed SQL engine for R2 Data Catalog

## Getting started

- [Getting started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/get-started/index.md): Create your first pipeline to ingest streaming data and write to R2 Data Catalog as an Apache Iceberg table.

## Query data

- [Query data](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/query-data/index.md): Understand how to query data with R2 SQL

## SQL reference

- [SQL reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/sql-reference/index.md): Comprehensive reference for SQL syntax, functions, and data types supported in R2 SQL.
- [Aggregate functions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/sql-reference/aggregate-functions/index.md): Reference for all 33 aggregate functions supported in R2 SQL, organized by category.
- [Complex types](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/sql-reference/complex-types/index.md): Reference for querying struct, array, and map column types in R2 SQL.
- [Scalar functions](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/sql-reference/scalar-functions/index.md): Reference for all 173 scalar functions supported in R2 SQL, organized by category.

## Troubleshooting guide

- [Troubleshooting guide](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/troubleshooting/index.md): Troubleshoot common R2 SQL errors including query structure, type, and timeout issues.

## Tutorials

- [Tutorials](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/tutorials/index.md): Step-by-step R2 SQL tutorials for querying data stored in R2.
- [Build an end to end data pipeline](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/tutorials/end-to-end-pipeline/index.md): This tutorial demonstrates how to build a complete data pipeline using Cloudflare Pipelines, R2 Data Catalog, and R2 SQL.

## Platform

- [Platform](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/platform/index.md): R2 SQL platform details including pricing and configuration.
- [Pricing](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/platform/pricing/index.md): R2 SQL pricing details and billing information during open beta.

## Reference

- [Reference](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/reference/index.md): R2 SQL reference documentation for limitations, best practices, and Wrangler commands.
- [Limitations and best practices](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/reference/limitations-best-practices/index.md): Supported features, known limitations, and best practices for R2 SQL queries.
- [Wrangler commands](https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2-sql/reference/wrangler-commands/index.md): Wrangler CLI commands for querying data with R2 SQL.
